semantic.role: Engine module that aggregates project directory structure into a hierarchical SpineProjectUnit by scanning folders, reading index documents, and validating compatibility.
responsibilities: Recursively scan a root project directory to discover all subfolders and nested project structures.
For each discovered folder, construct a SpineFolderUnit containing references to child folders and projects.
For each discovered project, read its spine index document (if present) and validate compatibility via `isCompatibleIndexDocument`.
Assemble the aggregated hierarchy into a single SpineProjectUnit with metadata (schema version, generator version, provenance).
Provide an idempotent aggregation method that can be called to regenerate the spine structure from disk state.
outOfScope: LLM interaction or prompt handling (imports LLMClient type only, not used in aggregation logic).
CLI argument parsing or command execution.
HTTP server or API endpoint definitions.
MCP tool definitions or protocol handling.
invariants: Engine Independence: The module must not import CLI entrypoints; it only imports shared types, utilities, and infra helpers – confirmed compliant.
Decoupling from Service Orchestration: The module should not depend on service orchestration layers; it uses only foundational infra (fs, path, index-reader) – confirmed compliant.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide the core aggregation engine for the ArchSpine system, enabling building of a complete hierarchical spine index from a project directory.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit – established the foundational Aggregator class as the central engine for scanning and indexing project structures.

publicSurface.description: Class that scans a root directory, discovers folders and nested projects, reads their spine index documents (if compatible), and builds a SpineProjectUnit representing the full aggregated hierarchy. Instances are created with rootDir and spineIndexDir, and a public method (likely `aggregate` or `run`) returns the aggregated project unit.

English.role: Engine module for aggregating project directory structure into a hierarchical SpineProjectUnit.
responsibilities: Recursively scan a root project directory to discover subfolders and nested projects.
Construct SpineFolderUnit objects for each folder, with references to child folders and projects.
Read and validate spine index documents for each discovered project using `isCompatibleIndexDocument`.
Assemble the entire tree into a single SpineProjectUnit with metadata including schema version, generator version, and provenance.
Provide a public method to execute the aggregation and return the final unit.
outOfScope: CLI argument parsing or command execution.
HTTP server or API endpoint definitions.
MCP tool definitions or protocol handling.
